name: bunlight-mcp
description: Bunlight MCP server: exposes scrape, detect, cookie-extract, and pool-run as MCP tools.

tools.name: bunlight_scrape
tools.description: Open a URL with the chosen Bunlight profile and return title, URL, and content length. Profile is one of static, fast, http, stealth, max.

tools.name: bunlight_detect
tools.description: Detect frameworks, CMS, and WAF on a URL using wappalyzergo, then suggest the cheapest Bunlight profile that will succeed.

tools.name: bunlight_extract_cookies
tools.description: Load a cookie jar file from cookies/private/<domain>.json (CDP or Playwright format) and return its parsed contents.

tools.name: bunlight_pool_run
tools.description: Run a list of URLs through PagePool with the given profile and concurrency, return JSONL of {url,title,latencyMs} per result.
